3009490.name: The Promise
3009490.description:
Join Kael Arken in His Fight for Survival on a Mysterious Island!

Kael Arken finds himself trapped on a remote island, filled with strange and powerful creatures. With his unique ability to copy powers from the monsters he encounters, Kael emerges from each battle stronger and more prepared for the challenges ahead. The game takes you on a journey filled with intense action, adventure, and suspense, as you explore the island’s dark and enigmatic environment. Traverse an ever-changing, semi-open world where the cycle of day and night alters both your surroundings and the threats you’ll face!

The gameplay of Kael’s journey is a mix of strategy, fast reflexes, and the unique abilities gained from enemies. Switch between a variety of melee and ranged weapons to craft your own combat style and approach each battle your way.
3009490.supported_languages: 英语, 土耳其语, 德语, 俄语
